main.name: Mashookh Khan
main.shortDesc: Building scalable products with Next.js, AWS, DevOps & AI Automation. Full Stack Developer based in Hyderabad, India.

about.title: Full Stack Developer & DevOps Engineer
about.about: I'm Mashookh Khan, a Full Stack Developer based in Hyderabad, India. I'm a Computer Science graduate (B.Tech CSE — AI & ML Specialization) from KCC Institute of Technology and Management, Greater Noida. I'm passionate about building scalable systems, automation, DevOps pipelines, and AI-powered engineering solutions. I love architecting production-grade applications that combine modern frontends with robust cloud backends — from Next.js and FastAPI to AWS, Docker, and N8N automation workflows.

projects.name: Meal Dash - Food Delivery Web App
projects.techstack: React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Stripe, Auth0, ShadCN UI, Tailwind CSS
projects.desc: FoodDash is a dynamic food delivery platform offering dedicated interfaces for customers and restaurant owners. Built with React.js, TypeScript, ShadCN UI, and Tailwind CSS, it delivers a seamless user experience with a modern and responsive design. The backend, powered by Node.js and MongoDB, enables efficient data handling and real-time order management. Secure payments are facilitated through Stripe, while user authentication is managed via Auth0, ensuring robust security.

projects.name: Nomisma - Personal Finance & Budget Tracker
projects.techstack: Next.js, TypeScript, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Clerk, Gemini AI, Resend, React Email, Inngest
projects.desc: Nomisma is an intelligent personal finance tracker designed to help users manage their budgets, expenses, and financial goals effortlessly. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, ShadCN UI, and Tailwind CSS, it delivers a clean, responsive, and user-friendly interface. Supabase powers the backend with secure real-time data storage and instant sync across devices. AI features via Gemini AI enable receipt scanning and automatic transaction categorization with over 95% accuracy. Budget reports and notifications are delivered via Resend and React Email, while background tasks are managed through Inngest.

projects.name: Tune Tutor - Music Course Website
projects.techstack: Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Aceternity UI
projects.desc: Crafted a modern and interactive music course website using Next.js, providing users with a seamless learning experience. Built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Aceternity UI to deliver stunning animations and a visually rich interface. The platform showcases music courses, instructors, and learning paths in an engaging and accessible format.

projects.name: Vespera Blog
projects.techstack: React.js, Node.js, Appwrite, Tailwind CSS, TinyMCE
projects.desc: Developed a React app allowing users to add, delete, and view blog posts, enhancing user engagement and content management. Built with Appwrite as the backend-as-a-service for authentication and database, TinyMCE for rich text editing, and Tailwind CSS for a clean, responsive UI.

projects.name: Currency Convertor
projects.desc: Developed a real-time Currency Convertor web application using React.js and Tailwind CSS. The application integrates with a live exchange rate API to provide instant, accurate currency conversions between multiple global currencies, featuring an intuitive and responsive user interface.

projects.name: Todo App
projects.desc: The ToDo App is a task management application that allows users to add, delete, and update their to-do items efficiently. This app is designed to help users stay organized and manage their tasks with ease.

educations.institute: KCC Institute of Technology and Management, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh
educations.degree: B.Tech CSE | AI and ML Specialization
desc: Pursuing Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering with AI and ML Specialization.
Gained hands-on experience in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data Science.
Worked on full-stack web development projects using modern technologies including React, Node.js, and databases.

Developed and maintained backend services using Python and FastAPI with MySQL databases, designing REST APIs for HR and CRM platform workflows covering interview scheduling, meeting logging, and lead capture pipelines.

Built production Next.js 14 frontend applications integrated with WhatsApp Business API, calling and SMS APIs, and SMTP for lead capture into Google Sheets, with multi-domain routing via Caddy reverse proxy, CI/CD pipelines, and scheduled encrypted mail backups.

Managed containerized microservices on AWS (Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, API Gateway, Route 53) using Docker and Nginx, with Grafana and Prometheus health dashboards, N8N automation workflows, Cloudflare firewall rules, and function-level optimizations for cold-start latency and uptime.
